nasb.text: How blessed is the man who fears always, But he who hardens his heart will fall into calamity.

esv.text: Blessed is the one who fears the Lord always, but whoever hardens his heart will fall into calamity.

cnv.text: 常存戒懼之心的，這人就為有福； 心裡剛硬的，必陷在禍患裡。

ccb.text: 敬畏上帝必蒙福， 顽固不化必遭祸。

csbs.text: 常存敬畏的，这人是蒙福的！ 硬着自己心的，必陷入祸患。
